case_title: REVILLA, CONSUELO vs. GIRON, RENE, M.D.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF REVILLA, CONSUELO AS TO DEFENDANT GIRON, RENE, M.D.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REVILLA, CONSUELO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GIRON, RENE, M.D. $10,228.52 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,308.52
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF REVILLA, CONSUELO AS TO DEFENDANT GIRON, RENE, M.D. OEX HEARING SET FOR SEP-08-1993 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 06

EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GIRON, RENE, M.D.
